_comment: Machine-readable license policy for vibe-tb (BSL-1.1, converts to Apache-2.0 on 2030-03-30).

knownIssues.resolution: Added npm override in server/package.json forcing exceljs to use unzipper@^0.12.3 which dropped the binary→buffers chain entirely. Verified buffers and binary are no longer in the dependency tree.

knownIssues.pulledInBy: vite (dev dependency — never shipped to users)
knownIssues.action: Acceptable. CC-BY-4.0 is a data/creative-works license. This package is build-time only and not bundled into the application. No attribution required in shipped code.
knownIssues.notes: Dev dependency only. Does not affect runtime or distribution.

licenseFile.status: PRESENT — full BSL-1.1 text with parameters

sourceHeaders.note: BSL-1.1 requires conspicuous display of the License on each copy.

sourceCodeLink.description: Not legally required by BSL-1.1, but kept for transparency.
sourceCodeLink.status: IMPLEMENTED — Source Code link in Sidebar footer (Sidebar.tsx)
